method_description: Make direct reduced iron from iron ore using low-carbon hydrogen as the reductant.
evidence_summary: Pilot split from the aggregate H2 DRI electric steel route plus IEA and Australian steel-transition benchmarks; values are indicative topology-test data.
derivation_method: Reduced-form decomposition split. Aggregate H2 DRI route inputs are separated into DRI production and downstream melt/refine finishing rows.
review_notes: Main decomposed H2 DRI production method. Costs and hydrogen intensity remain broad route archetypes.

method_description: Make direct reduced iron from iron ore using natural gas as a transitional reductant.
evidence_summary: Pilot split from the aggregate H2 DRI electric steel route plus IEA and Australian steel-transition benchmarks; values are indicative topology-test data.
derivation_method: Reduced-form decomposition split. Aggregate H2 DRI route inputs are separated into DRI production and downstream melt/refine finishing rows.
review_notes: Included as a transitional comparator for the H2 DRI process-chain pilot.

method_description: Supply DRI as an imported or externally supplied residual option for process-chain feasibility tests.
evidence_summary: Placeholder residual import option retained so the melt/refine child can be tested without forcing domestic DRI in every scenario.
derivation_method: Residual supply proxy with no domestic process inputs or direct emissions in this library boundary.
review_notes: Use only as a feasibility and sensitivity placeholder until trade and upstream DRI evidence is authored.
